productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Green Polo Tshirt
description: Composition Green polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with appliqued digit on the right sleeve, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash similar colours together Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair it with straight Fit denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
